title: Kriess Hydraulics - We can make it a third win
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - This recognition is significant for us, reflecting our steadfast commitment to excellence and our esteemed reputation in the industry.


> After 39 years of dedicated service, we take immense pride in our remarkable team.


Our journey has been guided by our core values of excellence and teamwork. We believe in delivering superior quality in every project and fostering a collaborative environment where every team member's contribution is valued. This philosophy has been instrumental in our sustained success.

Our inspiration comes from Eddie and Bobby Lehy, whose dedication and principles continue to influence our work. We also owe a great deal to their wives, Maureen (who sadly passed away in 2024) and Annette, who have served as our role models.

Their invaluable lessons have shaped our company’s ethos and driven us to constantly strive for excellence.

Our team operates as a cohesive family, treating each other and our customers with utmost respect. We emphasise a positive attitude and friendly service, always aiming to exceed customer expectations.

A special mention goes to Wendell Botha, who has been exemplifying our commitment and values for more than 20 years.

We extend our heartfelt gratitude to our loyal customers, who have become cherished friends. Your loyal support has been crucial to our success, and we are deeply thankful for your trust and confidence in us.


> Vote here for Kriess Hydraulics: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/


The Kriess Hydraulics team.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
